Asian pear (apple pear) growing by I-435N near 87th Street Pkway . From a core obviously chucked out a car window. Fruit is abundant but stunted due to lack of thinning. Fruit in late October is good, very juicy but slightly bitter. Definitely edible. Growing

Persimmon Tree, beautiful even after leaves have fallen, with bright orange-reddish fruit. Guessing it's American Persimmon since it is very bitter. Fruit is small due to lack of thinning. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-November.
